final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire [2:0] channel_select,
    output reg [2:0] selected_channel
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or negedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (!reset) begin
        selected_channel <= 3'b000; // Reset state
    end else begin
        selected_channel <= channel_select; // Update channel
    end
end

endmodule
